comment.body:
You need to read Alma's posts. She has detailed out the collar extensively in many posts.  Get your money's worth.  

From this morning...."If the spot is above the long put strike (5565), there can be only a mild supportive effect. The OTM expiring put spread provides minor support, which the new collar largely absorbs. However, if the put spread expires ITM, then short vanna, long charm, and short speed create a suppressive environment toward the lower leg (4700), roughly towards 5114.24
The collar’s psychological impact is bigger than its actual influence on flows. And the funds know this, which is why they play with it."
